creator: ppl@idios.org
text:
I approve this patch.

On Thu, 30 Nov 2006 11:10:21 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of x11-wm/windowlab,
>
> Please note that PR ports/106057 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/106057

> Edwin Groothuis
